data.title: Over $77 million in liquidations occurred across the entire network in the past hour, with $33.17 million in BTC liquidations.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $77.59 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past hour, including $2.21 million in short positions and $75.37 million in long positions. In addition, $33.17 million in BTC positions were liquidated and $11.6 million in ETH positions were liquidated.

data.title: Bowman defies the trend and advocates for interest rate cuts; analysts say his future vote could be crucial.
data.description: Analyst Adam Button stated, "It was initially thought that Bowman might return to a hawkish stance after her failed bid for Fed chair, but she has held firm. Her views on 'moderate restraint' contradict the consensus of most Fed members, who believe that current policy is either in a neutral range or very close. Her voice will become very important over time, as close votes are possible, and she could easily revert to a hawkish stance if prices rebound." (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve's Bowman Anticipates Robust Economic Growth and Stabilizing Job Market
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman has expressed expectations for the economy to experience "robust" growth. She also anticipates a decline in inflation and a stabilization in the job market.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Bowman Notes Easing Inflation Pressure as Tariff Impact Diminishes
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve Governor Bowman has indicated that inflationary pressures are gradually easing as the impact of tariffs diminishes.

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Bowman: Given the current risks, there should be no signal to pause the rate-cutting cycle.
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Bowman stated that given the current risks, the Fed should not signal a pause in its rate-cutting cycle, and monetary policy is currently "moderately tightening." (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Bowman: The Fed should be ready to cut interest rates again at any time.
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Bowman stated that the Fed should be prepared to cut interest rates again, as the impact of tariffs diminishes, inflationary pressures are easing, and the economy is expected to grow "solidly," inflation is declining, and the job market is stabilizing. Congress has granted the Fed independence, enabling it to make difficult decisions. (Jinshi)

data.title: BREAKING: Donald Trump Crosses Out Strongest Candidate for Fed Chairmanship – ‘He’ll Stay Where He Is’
data.description:
Donald Trump announced that the person expected to become the new Fed chairman will continue working in their current position. Continue Reading: BREAKING: Donald Trump Crosses Out Strongest Candidate for Fed Chairmanship – ‘He’ll Stay Where He Is’
source: https://en.bitcoinsistemi.com/breaking-donald-trump-crosses-out-strongest-candidate-for-fed-chairmanship-he-ll-stay-where-he-is/

data.title: Federal Reserve's Bowman Advocates Against Signaling Pause in Rate Cuts
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve Governor Bowman has stated that given the current risks, the Federal Reserve should avoid signaling a pause in the cycle of rate cuts. He emphasized that monetary policy is currently 'moderately tight.'

data.title: Wikimedia Foundation Partners with Major Tech Firms for AI Model Training
data.description:
According to PANews, the Wikimedia Foundation has announced agreements with several major AI companies, including Microsoft, Google, Amazon, and Meta, to utilize Wikipedia content for training large-scale models via the Wikimedia Enterprise platform. New partners also include Mistral AI and Perplexity. This initiative aims to address the trend of reduced traffic due to AI-generated summaries and to provide sustainable revenue for the foundation.

Wikipedia is currently the only platform among the world's top ten websites operated by a non-profit organization, boasting over 15 billion monthly visits and more than 65 million articles.

data.title: DownDetector: Social Media Platform X is Out of Order
data.description: According to Downdetector, the social media platform "X" is experiencing a malfunction. Functions such as search, timeline, and DM are unstable, some search results display "no posts," timeline content fails to load properly, and community features are unusable. Some users also report that the outage of the past two days has not been fully resolved, and the extent of the impact varies across different regions and accounts.

data.description:

data.title: Yi Lihua: Satoshi Nakamoto's account is the best bullish answer for BTC.
data.description: Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua stated on the X platform: "For ordinary investors, the best strategy is to invest and wait. Most cryptocurrency trading results in losses; you simply can't beat institutions and platforms. At the same time, you must avoid becoming a short seller. Historically, there have been two prominent figures representing the bull and bear markets: one is Warren Buffett, a bull who invested and held for most of his life, only shorting a few times over decades, waiting for a better bottom to buy. His core team built a trillion-dollar fortune. The other is Bill Gates, a short seller who once owned over 40% of Microsoft, later gradually reducing his holdings to manage assets. He even shorted Tesla, losing billions, but successfully turned his trillion-dollar net worth into a hundred-billion-dollar one. This is because the core of this world is: good assets are limited, but the money-printing machine is unlimited. Looking at the long term, the opportunities for bulls far outweigh those for bears. Satoshi Nakamoto's account is the best bullish answer for BTC."

data.title: Trump wants Hassett to stay in her post, causing a short-term plunge in spot gold and silver prices.
data.description: US President Trump, speaking on Friday about Hassett and the Federal Reserve position, said he wanted Hassett to remain on the National Council of Economic Advisers (NEC). Trump said, "Hassett has been doing well on television, and I want him to stay in his current position. We'll see." Trump added, "Fed officials don't talk much, Hassett talks a lot." Following Trump's remarks, the US dollar index (DXY) quickly rose by more than 20 points, and spot gold and silver briefly plunged, currently trading at $4550/ounce and $87.5/ounce respectively. (Golden Ten)

data.title: Trump: May impose tariffs on countries that disagree on Greenland
data.description: Trump indicated he might impose tariffs on countries that disagree with him on the Greenland issue. (Jinshi)

data.title: State Street Drops After Q4 Results: Beat on Paper, But Costs Raise Questions
data.description:
State Street shares slipped after the bank posted a Q4 earnings and revenue beat, but investors focused on restructuring costs and a higher-than-expected expense outlook for 2026.
source: https://tokenist.com/state-street-drops-after-q4-results-beat-on-paper-but-costs-raise-questions/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=state-street-drops-after-q4-results-beat-on-paper-but-costs-raise-questions

data.title: Spot gold fell below $4,570 per ounce, while the US dollar index (DXY) rose nearly 10 points in the short term.
data.description: Spot gold fell below $4,570 per ounce, down 1.03% on the day, while New York silver futures broke below $87 per ounce, down 5.82% on the day. The US dollar index (DXY) rose nearly 10 points in the short term. (Jinshi)

data.title: The top two addresses holding long positions in Hyperliquid's Ethereum network have seen their total unrealized losses widen to $8.24 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the short-term market decline caused all limit buy orders for ETH and BTC held by the top two long positions on Hyperliquid's Ethereum network to be filled, resulting in an increase of 9,890.76 ETH and 1,018.97 BTC, and the total unrealized loss of the positions also widened to $8.24 million.

data.title: Weekly Crypto Regulation Roundup: Political Pressure, Market Structure Delays, and a Surveillance Flashpoint
data.description:
The past week in crypto regulation exposed a deeper truth about the current policy environment: digital asset oversight is no longer just a technical debate about market structure but a proxy battleground for institutional independence, surveillance power and political leverage.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/weekly-crypto-regulation-roundup-political-pressure-market-structure-delays-and-a-surveillance-flashpoint/
